ideas.name: Care Gap Closure
ideas.desc: Analyzes HEDIS quality measure gaps, prioritizes patient outreach, manages campaigns, and provides HEDIS compliance dashboards. Covers breast cancer screening, diabetes HbA1c, colorectal screening, blood pressure control, and adolescent well-care.

ideas.name: Clinical Notes Summarizer
ideas.desc: Summarizes patient encounters, performs medication reviews, generates problem lists, and produces referral summaries from clinical documentation. Flags polypharmacy risks and highlights abnormal lab results.

ideas.name: Patient Intake Automation
ideas.desc: Manages patient intake forms, insurance verification, appointment scheduling, and pre-visit summary preparation. Verifies coverage in real-time, matches patients to available provider slots, and generates questionnaires by visit type.

ideas.name: Prior Authorization
ideas.desc: Manages prior authorization requests, clinical criteria checks, status tracking, and appeal preparation for healthcare payers. Auto-checks payer-specific rules by CPT code, tracks approval rates, and drafts appeal letters for denials.

ideas.name: Staff Credentialing
ideas.desc: Manages staff credential tracking, expiration alerts, verification audits, and onboarding checklists for healthcare organizations. Tracks medical licenses, DEA registrations, board certifications, BLS/ACLS/PALS, and CME hours.
